question: Average website sign-ups per year are shown in the chart. Which of the following statements is true?

options.A: The latest year proves that sign-ups are now permanently declining.
options.B: The latest year has the lowest sign-ups of the entire period on a full-year basis.
options.C: None of the above conclusions about the full-year trend are justified from this data, which only covers part of the latest year.
options.D: The latest year shows a sharp decline in total sign-ups compared to previous full years.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 5 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (569 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 1,187 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
